item.title: Primary Sclerosing Cholangitis Recurrence After Liver Transplantation: A Systematic Review and Updated Meta-Analysis.
item.description: Liver international : official journal of the International Association for the Study of the Liver - Meta-analysis - Primary sclerosing cholangitis (PSC) is an immune-mediated cholestatic liver disease. Liver transplantation (LT) remains the only definitive treatment for patients with advanced disease. However, r...

item.title: Metastatic Crohn Disease Manifesting as Granulomatous Cheilitis in a Patient With Well-Controlled Crohn Disease.
item.description: ACG case reports journal - Case report - Crohn disease (CD) can affect any organ system outside the gastrointestinal tract, and these conditions are classified as extraintestinal manifestations and include arthritis, uveitis, and cutaneou...
